queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account correlates with reduced credit default probability in consumer lending portfolios.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigating the protective effect of negative checking account balances on the determinants of default in retail credit risk assessment.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical evaluation of minimal savings account balances as a credit risk driver associated with lower probability of loan default.
